name: CatTrio
short_description: A physics puzzle game in which you have to put cats in a pot and match them!　Aim for a high score!
detailed_description:
Catrio is a puzzle game in which you collect cute cats

A cat that bumps into a cat of another breed will grow a little bigger to intimidate the other cat.
When three cats of the same breed are combined, they will go out of the pot and disappear.
Let many cats go out to the pot to get a high score!

Shake the pot to match the cats!

You can shake it by pressing the Shake button, and various shortcut keys are also supported!

Supported Controllers

Keyboard, various controllers, and mouse operation are supported!

Title screen basic operations

Select
Decide
Back

Language switching

It's on the top right.

Main Screen Basic Operations

Move left / right
Drop
Shake
Screenshot

About Secondary Use


We welcome video submissions and streaming of game play.
We hope you will enjoy it with your audience!

Please do not turn off in-game sound when streaming.
On YouTube, revenue is distributed to creators through Content ID.
You may see a “copyright complaint” or other notice for your video,
Please be assured that this will not affect your YouTube channel.

Copyright Notice

Powered by “CRIWARE”.CRIWARE is a trademark of CRI Middleware Co., Ltd.
